Next, use 2 medium of Onion after the cooking fat is heated to add body. Next, use 2 medium of Tomato after the onion has started to soften to form the gravy base. Finally, use 1 tbsp of Ginger garlic during the masala stage to add depth. Cook this stage patiently so the aromatics soften properly and the base develops a balanced flavor before you move ahead.

First, use 1 cup of Water after the base is ready to set the body and consistency. Next, use 1 tsp of Salt during simmering to set the seasoning. Finally, use 0.5 tsp of Dry mango powder during simmering to add the signature flavor. Maintain controlled heat in this stage so the mixture cooks evenly and each added ingredient integrates without losing its intended texture.
